title: Colin Jenkins
text: Home * People * Colin Jenkins Colin Jenkins , a British scientific software developer from the Mumbles district of Swansea , Wales . He holds a B.Sc. with Honours in mathematics and computer science in 1982 from the University of South Wales , and a M.Sc. in cognition , computing & psychology in 1984 from University of Warwick . While professionally working in the fields of artificial intelligence , cognitive science and psychology, massively parallel hardware architectures , robotics , and signal processing , he cares about public health and is interested in infectious disease modelling , and further started chess programming with his JavaScript engine Lozza [1] [2] .
